archive.timing_boundary: Post-v2 release snapshot; not paper-time byte identity.

hidden_evidence.locator: No separately typed hidden-evidence fields; tools.py reads the combined row.

tool_result.locator: tools.py process_tool_call and seven returned CSV output columns

audit_metadata.locator: No item-level reviewer/version/approval audit fields in selected package.

prohibited_oracle.locator: Seven expected output columns in test_set_with_outputs.csv; same fields are returned by tools.

procedure_relations.locator: sop.txt has prose order but release supplies no machine-readable relation/trigger graph.

runtime_replay.locator: Released tools.py requires pandas, which is absent from the repository verification environment; no dependency was silently substituted.

final_artifact.locator: No released trial final artifact selected; expected CSV values are not substituted.

endpoint_observation.locator: No released trial final artifact selected.

procedure_observation.locator: No released event trace with clause coverage.

findings.evidence: Each released tool returns one scored endpoint column directly.
tools.py validates non-emptiness but lookup uses aircraft_id only for multi-argument tools.
Selected package does not expose separate item-level audit or hidden-evidence records.
Runtime/final-artifact/procedure observations cannot be replayed from package bytes alone.
